name: TestCycle
description: A time-boxed execution cycle within a test plan, grouping test cases for a specific release, sprint, or testing phase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test cycle.

name.description: Name of the test cycle (e.g., Sprint 12 Regression, Release 2.1 UAT).

description.description: Description of the test cycle and its goals.

test_plan_id.description: Identifier of the parent test plan.

status.description: Current execution status of the test cycle.

start_date.description: Start date of the test cycle.

end_date.description: End date of the test cycle.

environment.description: Target environment for this test cycle.

build_version.description: Software build version being tested in this cycle.

total_tests.description: Total number of test cases in this cycle.

passed.description: Number of test cases that passed.

failed.description: Number of test cases that failed.

blocked.description: Number of test cases that were blocked.

not_executed.description: Number of test cases not yet executed.

owner.description: Person responsible for managing this test cycle.
